description: Deed of acknowledgment (iqrār) in Arabic script. The first ~7 lines are preserved and part of two lines in the margin. The acknowledgment is made by at least two people, including a father [...] b. Ibrāhīm and his son, in favor of Saʿd(?) b. [...] al-Naṣrānī (the Christian). Mentions a sum of money (fulūs). Needs further examination.
